description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of dark and natural wood exterior finishes. The front features a covered driveway with a garage, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating, overlooking a grassy backyard. The structure is set on a rectangular plot with a mix of paved and grassy surfaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark and wood exterior, large windows, a garage, and a spacious backyard deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved driveway, and a mix of dark and wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition from paved to grassy areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wooden deck, outdoor seating, and expansive backyard lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible windows, wood paneling, and the side of the deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, adjacent to a garage, and accessed via a paved walkway
